request_payload.exposure_text: Remember when we had the draft? At least then everyone shared the burden. Now our kids are fighting while others sit at home. It's not fair, and it's not safe. We need a modern system where everyone contributes to national security. Our allies do it - why shouldn't we? #FairShare #NationalSecurity
